editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes, shipping milestones, trust wins, and installability improvements.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
pinnedHighlights: Freed Desktop now calls AppKit activation directly when restoring the main window
Startup now retries the native show path and records activation probe results
macOS launch recovery now restores regular app activation before showing the main Freed Desktop window
Freed Desktop now unminimizes and orders the main window front when reopening or recovering it
